case_title: JOHN KARR BALBACH VS. ICOA, INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALBACH, JOHN KARR AS TO DEFENDANT ICOA, INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALBACH, JOHN KARR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ICOA, INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION $91,477.24 PRINCIPAL, $5,322.04 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97,099.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
